examples: Rest is what you need so that you do not overtax yourselves, and adequate sleep is most essential.
One way to make sure we do not overtax the server we are hosting our application on is to limit the amount of memory used by any scripts executed by PHP.
No matter how strong your willpower muscle becomes, it's important to always respect the fact that it is limited, and if you overtax it you will temporarily run out of steam.
These responses are perilous to a heart patient because they overtax an already ailing cardiovascular system.
The roughly two dozen flights that come and go here each day don't overtax the current facility.
